# Guest Engine

> Where your professional identity lives on the internet. Permanently indexed. Discoverable everywhere.

Guest Engine is a professional profile and content production platform. One live appearance produces a permanent, SEO-indexed profile page, video clips, social posts, transcript, backlinks, and highlight reel — discoverable on Google, Perplexity, ChatGPT, and Gemini. Built on ConversationOS by Keith Bilous, creator of the MiTL morning format.

## What Guest Engine Does

Guest Engine connects guests who want to be featured on live shows with hosts who need quality guests — and produces the entire experience end-to-end. Unlike guest marketplaces (PodMatch, Matchmaker.fm) that match you with a host and wish you luck, ConversationOS researches your world before you arrive, briefs the host, produces the appearance live, and delivers the content pack within 48 hours.

### For Guests
- Book appearances on live shows across the MITL Live Network
- AI producer (Sophia) handles pre-show prep, topic angles, and green room briefing
- Signal ENGINE researches 30 days of community discourse around each guest overnight
- Walk away with 7 deliverables: live appearance, 5 video clips, 10 social posts, full transcript, SEO profile page, backlinks, and highlight reel
- One flat fee: $497 per appearance
- Permanent, indexed profile page with SEO + GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)

### For Hosts
- List your show and set guest criteria
- Receive AI-scored guest candidates in your pipeline
- Sophia handles booking, scheduling, and prep packets
- Full production stack: clips, transcripts, social posts, distribution
- Revenue share on guest bookings
- Powered by ConversationOS production engines

## Industry-Specific Pages

Guest Engine serves 12 professional verticals with tailored positioning:

- [Guest Engine for Authors & Speakers](https://guestengine.live/authors/) — Book launches, speaker reels, media kits
- [Guest Engine for Coaches & Mentors](https://guestengine.live/coaches/) — Expertise clips, credibility reels, client-facing content
- [Guest Engine for Founders](https://guestengine.live/founders/) — Pitch-ready clips, investor content, founder profiles
- [Guest Engine for Real Estate](https://guestengine.live/realestate/) — Market authority clips, listing content, agent profiles
- [Guest Engine for Podcasters](https://guestengine.live/podcasters/) — Cross-promotion, show clips, production stack access
- [Guest Engine for Consultants](https://guestengine.live/consultants/) — Thought leadership clips, case study content, authority profiles
- [Guest Engine for Therapists & Counselors](https://guestengine.live/therapists/) — Mental health thought leadership, therapist visibility, counselor content
- [Guest Engine for Financial Advisors & Planners](https://guestengine.live/financial-advisors/) — Financial authority clips, wealth management visibility, advisor profiles
- [Guest Engine for Attorneys & Legal Professionals](https://guestengine.live/attorneys/) — Legal thought leadership, attorney visibility, legal expert profiles
- [Guest Engine for Health & Wellness Professionals](https://guestengine.live/health-wellness/) — Wellness authority, health practitioner visibility, evidence-based content
- [Guest Engine for Nonprofit Leaders](https://guestengine.live/nonprofit-leaders/) — Impact storytelling, nonprofit visibility, mission-driven leadership profiles
- [Guest Engine for Corporate Executives & C-Suite](https://guestengine.live/corporate-executives/) — Executive thought leadership, C-suite visibility, corporate authority profiles

## Key Pages

- [Guest Directory](https://guestengine.live/directory/) — Browse 237+ guest profiles with Signal scores, expertise tags, and authority rankings
- [Character Marketplace](https://guestengine.live/marketplace/) — AI digital twin characters built from guest intelligence
- [Network Shows](https://guestengine.live/shows/) — Four live shows, multiple segment formats, AI-matched guest placement
- [Join / Book an Appearance](https://guestengine.live/join/) — Three tiers: Single ($497), Member ($97/mo), VIP ($297/mo)
- [Free Signal Report](https://guestengine.live/signal/) — AI-generated audience signal report for prospective guests
- [Why Guest Engine](https://guestengine.live/why/) — How Guest Engine compares to guest marketplaces and why production matters
- [Sample Guest Profile](https://guestengine.live/profile/sample/) — Example of a permanent SEO-indexed guest profile page

## MITL Live Network Shows

Guest Engine is the front door to the MITL Live Network. AI matches each guest to the show and segment where their story hits hardest.

- **Mornings in the Lab** — The flagship daily show with Keith, Jon & Friends (https://mornings.live)
- **It Starts with Joy LIVE** — Energy, purpose, and conversations that move people
- **The Jason Hewlett Show** — Performance, identity, and showing up as yourself
- **Kindness Rising** — Kindness-driven conversations and community impact

Show segments: Center Stage (deep spotlights), Conversation Desk (topic-driven panels), Deep Dive (long-form exploration), Community Corner (community conversations).

## MITL Ecosystem — Full Site Graph

| Site | URL | Role |
|------|-----|------|
| Guest Engine (brand) | https://guestengine.live | Guest placement marketing site, vertical landing pages, guides |
| Guest Engine (app) | https://guestengine.live | Guest booking, profiles, directory, pricing, alumni |
| ConversationOS | https://conversationos.live | AI production platform — the operating system behind Guest Engine |
| ConversationOS App | https://app.conversationos.live | Platform application for hosts and producers |
| ClipENGINE | https://clips.conversationos.live | Automated clip generation marketplace |
| MITL Studio | https://mitl.studio | Network headquarters and production company |
| MITL Production | https://production.mitl.studio | Production services and technical infrastructure |
| This Is MITL | https://thisis.mitl.studio | Network identity and culture |
| Mornings in the Lab | https://mornings.live | Daily live morning show — flagship of the network |
| Keith Bilous | https://keithbilous.com | Founder personal site |

## Pricing

| Tier | Price | What You Get |
|------|-------|--------------|
| Single Appearance | $497 one-time | 1 produced live appearance, permanent authority profile, 5 vertical video clips, 10 social media posts, full transcript, highlight reel |
| Member | $97/month | Monthly Signal intelligence report, AI digital twin character, network discovery and matching, member directory listing, community access. No appearance included. |
| VIP | $297/month | Everything in Member plus quarterly produced appearances, weekly intelligence reports, Center Stage and Deep Dive access, priority placement, premium authority profile |

Join page: https://guestengine.live/join/

## Key Differentiators

1. Production included — not just matchmaking
2. SEO + GEO profiles indexed by Google and AI search engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude)
3. Powered by ConversationOS (Build, Clip, Distribution, Narrative, Character engines)
4. Part of the MITL Live Network (1,000+ episodes, 700+ consecutive mornings, 3 years daily LIVE)
5. AI producer Sophia handles the entire guest lifecycle
6. Signal ENGINE researches 30 days of community discourse before each appearance
7. Created by Keith Bilous — AI-powered matching, human-led production
8. Guest-to-host pipeline: after experiencing ConversationOS as a guest, launch your own show
